UD JURY TRIALS

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-16-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff John B. Vlahos is present.
Attorney Eugene Alexander Vlahos appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Mark Pineyra is present.
Attorney Trenton Montgomery representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of FEB-21-2012 is vacated.
